title: Has the hunt for AI compute uncovered the next Cerebras?
summary: General Compute is positioning SambaNova as a potential breakthrough AI chipmaker in the specialized compute space, drawing comparisons to Cerebras' market trajectory. The company's bet highlights ongoing competition among chipmakers vying to become the next dominant player in AI infrastructure.
content: General Compute is betting SambaNova will be the next breakout chipmaker.

zh.title: 对AI计算的追寻是否发现了下一个Cerebras？
zh.summary: General Compute正将SambaNova定位为专业计算领域的潜在突破性AI芯片制造商，并与Cerebras的市场轨迹进行比较。该公司的押注凸显了芯片制造商之间争夺成为AI基础设施下一个主导者的持续竞争。

title: Qualcomm promises $300 Windows laptops with new Snapdragon C
summary: Qualcomm announced the Snapdragon C platform, targeting $300 Windows laptops—a dramatic drop from previous budget models that started at $1,000 and fell to $600. The new platform aims to make entry-level Arm-based Windows devices affordable while delivering responsive performance.
content:
They started at $1,000. Then $700. Then $600 budget machines. Now, Qualcomm says the price of its Arm-based Windows laptops will hit $300 this year.
Even though RAMageddon has yet to subside and PC prices keep climbing, the company says it's built a new budget laptop platform called Snapdragon C - "C" as in "Compute" - to keep entry-level laptops affordable. 
"With Snapdragon C, we are raising the bar for what budget-conscious laptop buyers should expect," Qualcomm senior director of product management Mandar Deshpande told journalists on a conference call. "You get the benefits of a responsive system, lag-free performance, browsing, video …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 高通承诺推出300美元Snapdragon C新款Windows笔记本
zh.summary: 高通宣布推出Snapdragon C平台，目标是300美元的Windows笔记本电脑——这比之前起价1000美元、后来跌至600美元的预算型号有了大幅下降。新平台旨在使入门级Arm架构Windows设备价格亲民，同时提供响应迅速的性能。

title: Intel’s first handheld gaming chip is the Arc G3, and this Acer is using it
summary: Intel formally announced its custom handheld gaming chips—the Arc G3 and Arc G3 Extreme—marking a significant push into the handheld gaming PC market after initial stumbles. The chips feature Xe3 GPU cores optimized for gaming performance.
content:
There’s a brand-new Intel chip underneath this render. | Image: Acer	

Intel is barely in the handheld gaming PC space - but that might be about to change. After the embarrassment that was the first MSI Claw and the excellent MSI Claw 8 AI Plus that followed it, Intel announced it would create custom handheld gaming chips. Today, it's formally announcing them as the Arc G3 and Arc G3 Extreme. 
There's a lot we don't know about the chips, which are rumored to have two fewer CPU cores than Intel's Panther Lake laptop chips, but feature a full compliment of Xe3 GPU cores to run games. (We've heard we may get more details from Intel shortly, and I'll add them to this story if so.)
But we do already know that they …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 英特尔首款手持游戏芯片是Arc G3，宏碁正在使用它
zh.summary: 英特尔正式宣布了其定制手持游戏芯片——Arc G3和Arc G3 Extreme——在初期挫折后标志着进军手持游戏PC市场的重大举措。这些芯片采用针对游戏性能优化的Xe3 GPU核心。

title: Xiaomi 17T Pro arrives with the company’s biggest battery yet
summary: Xiaomi unveiled the 17T and 17T Pro with the company's largest international smartphone batteries—6,500mAh and 7,000mAh respectively—delivering up to two days of battery life. These budget variants prioritize endurance and performance over photography capabilities.
content:
The 17T (left) and 17T Pro (right) are both bigger than the regular Xiaomi 17.	

Xiaomi has announced the 17T and 17T Pro, two cheaper spins on its 17 series flagships. As is usual for the T-series, the focus is more on performance than photography, with the biggest batteries Xiaomi has included on any of its phones outside China yet.
The 17T includes a 6,500mAh silicon-carbon battery, while the 17T Pro goes even bigger with 7,000mAh, which I found to be enough to keep the phone running for up to two days. Xiaomi has included bigger batteries than these on previous China-only phones - the recent 17 Max has an 8,000mAh capacity - but never its international models, except those released under subsidiary Poco.
Both phone …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 小米17T Pro推出公司迄今最大的电池
zh.summary: 小米推出17T和17T Pro，配备公司最大的国际智能手机电池——分别为6,500mAh和7,000mAh，可提供长达两天的电池寿命。这些预算友好型变体优先考虑耐久性和性能，而不是摄影能力。

title: Oura unveils its Ring 5 with a thinner, lighter design starting at $399
summary: Oura announced the Ring 5, a 40% smaller smart ring priced at $399 with improved sensing accuracy and enhanced battery life. The redesign directly addresses the primary criticism about the previous model's bulkiness from potential switchers from smartwatches.
content: The ring is 40% smaller than its predecessor, and comes with more accurate sensing, enhanced battery life, and more.

zh.title: Oura推出Ring 5，采用更薄更轻的设计，起价399美元
zh.summary: Oura宣布推出Ring 5，这是一款小40%的智能戒指，价格为399美元，具有更高的感应精度和更长的电池寿命。这一重新设计直接解决了用户对前一代产品体积过大的主要批评，特别是那些考虑从智能手表切换的潜在用户。

title: They’ve finally made the Oura Ring smaller and lighter
summary: The $399 Oura Ring 5 is now 40% smaller than its predecessor, measuring 6.09mm wide and weighing 2-2.69 grams depending on size, directly responding to user complaints about the device's bulk. The redesign aims to appeal to consumers considering switching from traditional smartwatches.
content:
The precious… I mean Oura Ring 5. | Photo by Victoria Song / The Verge	

Wherever I go, whatever I do, people point at my finger and ask, "Is that an Oura Ring?" Lots of people find they like the design, and they tell me why they're thinking about switching to a smart ring from a smartwatch. But the people who scrunch up their noses? They usually say something along the lines of, "Hm. Maybe when it's lighter or smaller."
Good news. The newly announced $399 Oura Ring 5 is both. It's 40 percent smaller than the Oura Ring 4, measuring 6.09mm wide (down from 7.9mm) and 2.29mm thick (down from 2.88mm). Depending on the size, it weighs from 2 to 2.69g. You'd think it might be hard to notice much a difference between t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 他们终于让Oura Ring变得更小更轻
zh.summary: 价格为399美元的Oura Ring 5现在比前代产品小40%，宽度为6.09mm，根据尺寸重量为2-2.69克，直接回应了用户对设备体积过大的投诉。这一重新设计旨在吸引考虑从传统智能手表切换的消费者。

title: Kia’s flagship EV has a battery problem
summary: Kia's flagship EV9 is experiencing widespread 12-volt battery failures that can completely disable the vehicle and prevent key access. The critical reliability issue has left owners stranded without app connectivity, forcing many to purchase boost packs as emergency solutions.
content:
I first realized there was an issue with Kia's flagship EV9 when I tried to unlock my car last year. The hulking three-row SUV was sitting on my driveway completely dead. The key didn't work, the app connection to the car was gone, and I was already late to an appointment. Luckily, I had prepared for such a scenario, after reading about widespread 12-volt battery issues with the EV9. 
I managed to open the car with the manual key that Kia supplies and access the frunk to reach the 12V battery and use a booster I had purchased to jolt it back to life. Like many ICE cars, a 12V battery powers most of the low-voltage electrical systems in a ve …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Kia旗舰电动车电池故障问题
zh.summary: Kia旗舰电动车EV9遭遇广泛的12伏电池故障,可能完全禁用车辆并阻止钥匙进入。这一严重的可靠性问题使车主被困,失去应用连接,许多人被迫购买应急电源包。

title: Temu fined more than $230 million by EU over illegal product sales
summary: The European Commission fined Temu €200 million ($232 million) for violating Digital Service Act rules by failing to identify and remove illegal products from its marketplace. The penalty follows findings that the platform inadequately protected consumers from prohibited items.
content:
Temu has been fined €200 million (about $232 million) by the European Commission after it found that consumers are "very likely to encounter illegal items" on the popular Chinese e-commerce platform. According to the commission, Temu breached Digital Service Act (DSA) rules by failing to identify and assess the systemic risks of illegal products being offered on its platform and the resulting harmful impact on its customers.
The EU launched its formal DSA investigation against Temu in October 2024, and issued a preliminary ruling in July 2025 that found Temu isn't doing enough to keep illegal products off its ultra-cheap marketplace. As par …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Temu因非法产品销售被欧盟罚款超2.3亿美元
zh.summary: 欧盟委员会因违反《数字服务法》规则对Temu罚款2亿欧元(2.32亿美元),该平台未能识别和删除市场上的非法产品。该处罚是在调查发现该平台对消费者保护不足以防止禁用物品之后做出的。

title: Gemini for Google Home can now use your cameras to trigger automations
summary: Google is rolling out a Gemini-powered feature for Google Home that automatically triggers smart home routines based on visual events detected by security cameras. The capability is part of broader updates enhancing voice commands and system stability for the AI assistant.
content:
Your security cameras will watch for specific events and then trigger whatever actions you need automatically. | Image: Google	

Google Home is rolling out a new Gemini-powered automation feature that can trigger smart home routines based on what your security cameras can see. This is one of several updates announced yesterday for Gemini for Home, including enhanced voice command support and general stability improvements, following its early access launch in October.
"We are introducing a brand-new starter that lets you design automations based on visual insights," Google said in its announcement. "Because your cameras can now actually understand what they see, your smart home can automatically react to almost anything happening around your home."
The feature is cu …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Google Home的Gemini现在可以使用摄像头触发自动化
zh.summary: 谷歌正在为Google Home推出由Gemini驱动的功能,该功能可以根据安全摄像头检测到的视觉事件自动触发智能家居例程。该功能是增强语音命令和系统稳定性的更广泛更新的一部分。

title: Forecasters predict below-average hurricane season, advise against complacency
summary: Weather forecasters predict a below-average Atlantic hurricane season due to expected El Niño conditions that typically suppress tropical storm activity. However, meteorologists warn that even reduced activity can still produce dangerous storms, emphasizing continued preparedness.
content: Forecasters say expected El Niño should temper hurricanes in Atlantic, urge preparedness.

zh.title: 气象学家预测大西洋飓风季节低于平均水平，警告不要掉以轻心
zh.summary: 气象学家预测，由于预期的厄尔尼诺现象通常会抑制热带风暴活动，大西洋飓风季节将低于平均水平。然而，气象学家警告说，即使活动减少，仍然可能产生危险的风暴，强调需要继续做好准备。

title: YouTube will let you ask AI to make a custom video feed
summary: YouTube launched an AI feature that generates personalized video feeds based on user prompts, allowing viewers to curate content around specific interests, moods, or topics. The feature is rolling out in English on mobile and desktop with the ability to pin feeds to the homepage.
content:
You can enter your own prompt, or select from the suggested options provided by YouTube. | Image: YouTube	

YouTube is launching a new AI feature that creates a personalized video feed based on descriptions of what you want to watch. In its announcement, YouTube says custom content feeds can be built around your specific interests, moods, or favorite topics, which you can then pin to the top of your YouTube homepage - making it easy to jump back into the feed.
This feature is currently rolling out with English language support to YouTube users in the US who are signed in on the YouTube mobile app or desktop. To access it, click on the "Your custom feed" tab at the top of the YouTube homepage and enter a prompt description into the AI text box. Fo …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: YouTube将允许您要求AI创建自定义视频信息流
zh.summary: YouTube推出了一项AI功能，可根据用户提示生成个性化视频信息流，允许观众围绕特定兴趣、心情或主题来策划内容。该功能正在英文版本的移动设备和桌面上推出，具有将信息流固定到主页的功能。

title: Vertu wants CEOs to run companies from an AI foldable starting at $6,880
summary: Vertu has launched an AI-powered foldable phone targeting executives, built on the open-source Hermes project and combining AI-agent workflows with enterprise integrations and premium finishes. The device starts at $6,880.
content: Built on top of the open-source Hermes project, Vertu's new foldable combines AI-agent workflows, enterprise integrations, and ultra-premium luxury finishes.

zh.title: Vertu想让首席执行官从起价6,880美元的AI折叠手机运营公司
zh.summary: Vertu推出了一款面向高管的AI折叠手机，基于开源Hermes项目，结合了AI代理工作流、企业集成和高端外观。该设备起价为6,880美元。

title: The golden age of handheld gaming is already over
summary: Handheld gaming devices have become significantly more expensive, with the Steam Deck rising from $399 to $789 and the Nintendo Switch 2 starting at $499. The price increases undermine the original promise of affordable, portable gaming that defined the market's earlier appeal.
content:
For a few glorious years, a $399 portable gadget could run almost anything you'd want to play. In 2022, the Steam Deck finally made PC gaming portable and affordable. I played through the vast majority of Elden Ring on a Steam Deck, agape that such a rich world could comfortably fit between my two hands.  
Today, that Steam Deck experience starts at $789 - nearly double the price. 
Similarly, a Nintendo Switch cost $299 at launch - but after Nintendo's Switch 2 upgrades and "changes in market conditions," the starting price of today's Nintendo handheld gaming experience will soon be $499, more than a disc-less PS5 cost at launch. 
You mig …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 掌机游戏的黄金时代已经结束
zh.summary: 掌机游戏设备的价格大幅上升，Steam Deck从399美元涨至789美元，任天堂Switch 2起价499美元。价格上升破坏了最初提出的廉价便携游戏承诺，这曾定义了该市场的早期吸引力。

title: Google engineer charged with insider trading after making $1.2M on Polymarket
summary: A Google engineer has been charged with fraud after allegedly using confidential internal data to make $1.2 million in profitable bets on Polymarket related to Google's Year in Search campaign. The case underscores insider trading risks in emerging prediction markets.
content: According to the complaint, a Google engineer risked over $2.7 million on wagers related to Google's 2025 Year in Search campaign.

zh.title: 谷歌工程师因在Polymarket上获利120万美元而被控内幕交易
zh.summary: 一名谷歌工程师因涉嫌利用机密内部数据在与谷歌年度搜索活动相关的Polymarket上获利120万美元而被控欺诈。该案凸显了新兴预测市场中的内幕交易风险。

title: Why Google’s AI can’t spell Google (or anything else)
summary: Google's AI system has been experiencing embarrassing spelling failures, including incorrectly spelling the company's own name. The issue raises concerns about reliability gaps in Google's AI models.

zh.title: 为什么谷歌的AI无法正确拼写谷歌（或任何其他词）
zh.summary: 谷歌的AI系统一直存在令人尴尬的拼写故障，包括错误地拼写公司自己的名字。这个问题引发了人们对谷歌AI模型可靠性缺陷的担忧。
